description: Reads idempotency record to prevent duplicate operations.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Idempotency is a local gateway concern, not a licensing authority concern.

description: Writes idempotency record with operation status/body.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Idempotency is a local gateway concern, not a licensing authority concern.

description: Creates active license rows upon successful purchase verification.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to mapping. Webhook must call Devolens api/key/CreateKey first, then write sale mapping metadata to D1.

description: Looks up active license and purchaser details.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to cache check. Fall back or redirect key lookup/validation calls to Devolens.

description: Lists licenses matching a hash prefix for administrative resolution.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Retain as audited mapping lookups only. Disallow broad unauthenticated prefix checks.

description: Updates license entitlement (e.g. disabled or active).
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to cache update. Devolens is the sole authority for entitlement status changes.

description: Lists reset requests of a specific status (e.g. pending).
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Deprecate. Device resets will be handled client-side using Devolens deactivation.

description: Lists user data deletion requests.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local privacy deletion requests require compliance log retention.

description: Writes administrative audit events.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local audit logging is independent of Devolens authority.

description: Creates a pending user data deletion request.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local privacy deletion requests require compliance log retention.

description: Retrieves user data deletion request by ID.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local privacy deletion requests require compliance log retention.

description: Checks if there is already an open deletion request for a license hash.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local privacy validation prevents redundant/conflicting requests.

description: Updates status of user data deletion request.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Privacy deletion request lifecycle tracker.

description: Updates metadata of user data deletion request.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Privacy deletion request lifecycle tracker.

description: Nullifies purchaser_email and masked_license_key on completed requests.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Required to purge PII from compliance logs.

description: Retrieves reset request by ID.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Deprecate. Device resets will be handled client-side using Devolens deactivation.

description: Updates status of reset request.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Deprecate. Device resets will be handled client-side using Devolens deactivation.

description: Updates status of device bindings for a license to inactive.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to cache update. Devolens owns deactivation authority.

description: Assembles counts of items to be deleted/anonymized.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Required for privacy request flow confirmation.

description: Physically deletes device bindings matching a license hash.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to cache deletion. Devolens is the authority for registered devices.

description: Nullifies purchaser_email in reset requests.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Deprecate. Part of legacy reset requests deletion flow.

description: Nullifies email, updates status to disabled, and sets privacy deleted timestamp.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Convert to privacy cache update. Webhook/Admin must block key on Devolens as final authority.

description: Aggregates totals for admin dashboard.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Transition to aggregate local mapping/cache statistics with Devolens statistics.

description: Lists licenses for admin display.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Transition to query Devolens keys and correlate with local mapping records.

description: Lists device bindings for admin display.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Transition to query Devolens device registrations and correlate with local cache.

description: Lists audit events.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Keep. Local audit logging is independent of Devolens authority.

description: Lists idempotency records.
devolens_decoupling_strategy: Deprecate/Retain. Admin diagnostic log only.
